name: Taco Dip (Doug Likes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a baking dish or casserole dish, spreading it evenly.
4. Bake for about 20-25 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Top with chopped green onions, diced tomatoes, shredded cheese, or your preferred garnish. Serve with tortilla chips or sliced vegetables. Enjoy!
